channel.title: Weekly on AI Blog Factory
channel.description: Recent content in Weekly on AI Blog Factory

item.title: Weekly Tech Digest – May 29, 2026
item.description: Anthropic hits $965B valuation, Claude Opus 4.8 drops, big tech capex hits $725B, and more this week in tech.

item.title: Weekly Tech Digest – May 29, 2026
item.description: Google I/O 2026 wrap-up, IBM's $5B open source AI push, Microsoft's new coding model, Apple WWDC 2026 preview, critical Notepad++ vulnerability, and more this week in tech.
